'''Hachete''' was the name [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] gave to a [[Duelist Elite/Legends|Duelist Elite]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] he used to train himself in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]].

As its name suggested, it was armed with a pair of [[hachete]]s, a double-edged fighting blade as long and as wide as a [[Human/Legends|Human]] forearm. It had a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-resistant [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] chassis, and it was programmed with an array of skills in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial arts]], that it could execute at speeds slightly faster than those of [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. It had been manufactured with an inhibitor that prevented it from killing its opponent after the droid was victorious, but this was removed by the Sith. In [[33 BBY/Legends|32.5 BBY]], Maul knocked it down and crushed its head with his boot as it fought against him with three other Duelist Elites, [[Chain (droid)|Chain]], [[Cudgel (droid)|Cudgel]], and [[Rapier (droid)|Rapier]], but it was not damaged beyond repair.
